messages.subject: [R-jobs] Item Response Theory
messages.body_plain:
Hi,

I work with a medical education company and we are interested in
implementing item response theory for our question bank. A few packages for
this already exist in R. We are looking for an expert R developer to
facilitate the implementation with our data. This would be an ongoing
relationship for a part-time consultant. Please respond with a resume/CV
and your availability.

Thanks,

Nachi

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [R-jobs] Machine learning for solar power predictive maintenance
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Machine learning for solar power predictive maintenance
messages.body_plain:
2 positions open in Barcelona, Spain
Close date: 7-Feb-2018

Looking for researchers with background in statistics/machine learning to 
use historical operating data to identify improved or optimal prediction 
of maintenance needs for solar electric power plants.

https://careers-dnvgl.icims.com/jobs/10244/researcher-predictive-maintenance-solar/job
